_meta.game: 冰雪魔法城堡 (Frozen Magic Castle)
_meta.style_guide: Soft pastel children's book illustration. Cute, rounded shapes, big smiles, no scary faces. Consistent ice/frost theme: icy blue (#7dd3fc), lavender purple (#c4b5fd), pastel pink (#fbcfe8), snow white, with soft yellow sparkle accents. NO text, NO logos, NO watermarks. Must be original — do NOT reference Disney, Frozen, Elsa, or any trademarked character.
_meta.aspect_ratio_note: Grok 2 Image produces 1024x768 by default. That's fine for backgrounds. For standalone pieces the game crops transparent PNG at build or uses them as-is.

prompts.used_in: home scene + ending scene background
prompts.prompt: A dreamy fairytale night sky over a distant snow-capped mountain range, soft gradient from deep indigo at top to lavender purple at bottom, tiny twinkling stars, gentle drifting snowflakes, wispy pastel clouds, aurora borealis glow in icy blue and pink, children's picture book illustration style, no text, no logos, magical and peaceful, cinematic wide shot

prompts.used_in: assembly scene background (blank canvas where castle gets built)
prompts.prompt: An empty snowy hilltop foreground with soft sparkling snow, gentle lavender-to-pink sky behind, distant pastel snow mountains on the horizon, scattered tiny ice crystals glinting, no castle, no buildings, no characters, just a clean snowy stage ready for a castle to be placed on, children's picture book illustration, soft pastel colors (icy blue, lavender, pink), no text

prompts.used_in: scene 2 coloring page — cute fairytale ice castle
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a cute fairytale ice castle. Style: simple clean THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outline drawing on a PURE PRISTINE WHITE background. CRITICAL: every region must be FULLY ENCLOSED by continuous unbroken black lines with no gaps, no breaks, no dashed lines — a tiny gap will ruin the coloring experience. The castle should include: one big central castle body with a large arched gate in the middle, two side towers with small round windows, triangular pointed spires on top of each tower and the central roof, a small star or snowflake on each spire tip, and a few separate simple snowflake shapes floating in the sky around the castle. Lines should be thick (about 5-8 pixels wide) like a toddler coloring book. Rounded friendly shapes suitable for ages 3-5. NO shading, NO gray tones, NO colors, NO gradients, NO fills — ONLY pure black lines on pure white paper. No text, no watermarks, no signatures. High contrast, flat 2D, symmetrical castle, centered composition.

prompts.used_in: scene 2 coloring page — the ice princess
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a cute chibi ice princess character. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region FULLY ENCLOSED by unbroken lines. Show her standing smiling, long braid with a bow, a flowing gown with a snowflake pattern motif, a small tiara on her head, one hand raised waving. All details simplified to big clear separable shapes (face, hair, dress top, dress bottom, each sleeve, cape, tiara, shoes). Thick lines like toddler coloring book. NO shading, NO gray, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text. Ages 3-5 friendly, chibi rounded proportions, centered.

prompts.used_in: scene 2 coloring page — the snow sprite mascot
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of an adorable chibi snow sprite mascot. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. A cute round snowflake-like body with a friendly smiling face, two small round cheeks, tiny arms spread wide, a small pointed hat on top, surrounded by 4-5 small separate star and heart shapes floating around it. Thick lines, rounded friendly shapes, ages 3-5. NO shading, NO gray, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: scene 2 coloring page — giant snowflake mandala
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page featuring ONE large ornate centered snowflake mandala with six symmetrical arms, each arm having small teardrop, circle, and diamond details that form lots of separate enclosed fill regions. Around the main snowflake, include 6-8 smaller separate simple snowflakes and a few small stars. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background. Every shape fully enclosed by unbroken lines. Ages 3-5 friendly, thick lines, high contrast. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: scene 2 coloring page — magic wand
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a big cute magic wand in the center. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, all regions fully enclosed by unbroken lines. The wand has a long handle with decorative rings, a five-pointed star at the top with a small heart in the middle of the star, ribbons curling from the star, and around the wand 5-6 separate sparkle/star shapes and 2-3 simple snowflakes. Thick toddler coloring book lines. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: scene 2 coloring page — ice tiara
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a big pretty tiara crown centered on the page. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. The crown has a curved base, three tall points each ending in a circle gem, 4-5 smaller gems along the base, and decorative swirl patterns forming clearly separable fill regions. Around the crown, add 4-5 small separate sparkle stars. Thick lines, rounded friendly style, ages 3-5. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: scene 2 coloring page — ice throne
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a tall ornate ice throne, centered, empty (no one sitting). THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. The throne has a tall pointy back with a star on top, two armrests with curl ornaments, a seat cushion, stepped base with two rectangular steps, and 4-5 small separate snowflakes around it. Thick toddler coloring book lines. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: scene 2 coloring page — reindeer sleigh
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a cute sleigh with a friendly smiling reindeer in front. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. The sleigh has a curved wooden body with heart and star decorations, two curved runners at the bottom, a tall back, and is pulled by one cute cartoon reindeer with antlers, a nose circle, big round eyes, and a simple harness. Add 3-4 small separate snowflakes around. Thick lines, chibi style, ages 3-5. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: scene 2 coloring page — snowy forest scene
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a simple snowy forest scene. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. Include: three pointed pine trees of varying heights, one cute smiling snowman in the center with coal buttons, carrot nose, stick arms, and a little hat, a couple of small bushes, a ground line under everything, and 5-6 separate simple snowflakes in the sky. Thick toddler coloring book lines, ages 3-5 friendly, rounded shapes. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: scene 2 coloring page — heart with flowers
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a big heart centered on the page decorated with flowers and swirls. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. The heart has a decorative border, a smaller heart shape inside creating a ring, 4-5 simple flower shapes (each with clear petals, center circle, and a leaf) scattered around the outer border, and 3-4 small sparkles between them. Thick lines, symmetrical, rounded friendly shapes, ages 3-5. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: chapter 2 coloring page — rainbow with clouds
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a big happy rainbow arching over two puffy smiling clouds. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. Rainbow has 6-7 clearly separated arc bands, two rounded clouds at the base with friendly smiling faces, 3-4 small separate stars and hearts floating around. Thick toddler coloring book lines, ages 3-5 friendly, rounded. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: chapter 2 coloring page — cute unicorn
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a cute chibi unicorn standing in a meadow. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. The unicorn has a single spiral horn, flowing wavy mane with multiple clearly separated wavy sections, matching flowing tail, big round smiling eyes, long eyelashes, four legs with tiny hooves, a small heart on its cheek, and 3-4 small separate stars around it. Thick lines, rounded chibi proportions, ages 3-5. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: chapter 2 coloring page — butterfly garden
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a happy butterfly garden. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. One big symmetrical butterfly in the center with 4 wings, each wing divided into 3-4 enclosed pattern shapes (circles, hearts, teardrops), a smiling face on its body, and 3-4 separate smaller butterflies around it, 3-4 simple tulip or daisy flowers with petals, stems, and leaves, and a sun with rays in the corner. Thick toddler coloring book lines, ages 3-5. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: chapter 2 coloring page — penguin family
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of three cute chibi penguins standing on an ice floe — a big mommy penguin, a daddy penguin with a bow tie, and a tiny baby penguin in the middle. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. Each penguin has a clearly separated belly oval, face, eyes, beak, feet, wings. Below them an ice floe shape, above a few small snowflakes. Thick lines, rounded chibi style, ages 3-5 friendly. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: chapter 2 coloring page — rocket in space
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a big friendly rocket ship flying through space. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. The rocket has a pointed nose cone, a round porthole window with a cute smiling face inside, a body, two side fins, and flames puffing out the bottom in 3-4 separated flame shapes. Around it: 4-5 separate stars, a crescent moon with a face, a smiling planet with a ring, and a small comet. Thick lines, chibi style, ages 3-5. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: chapter 2 coloring page — cute mermaid
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a cute chibi mermaid girl sitting on a rock under the sea. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. She has long wavy hair divided into 3-4 separated wavy sections, a big smile, a seashell-style top, a long scaly tail with 6-8 clearly drawn scales, one hand waving. Around her: 2-3 small fish, one starfish, 3-4 separate bubbles, a piece of coral. Thick toddler coloring book lines, rounded chibi shape, ages 3-5. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: chapter 2 coloring page — birthday cupcake
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a giant happy cupcake centered on the page. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. The cupcake has a fluted paper cup (with vertical dividing lines making 6-8 separable bands), a swirled frosting top divided into 3 swirl layers, a big cherry on top with a stem and leaf, and decorations — 4-5 small separated sprinkle shapes (stars, hearts, circles) on the frosting. Around the cupcake: 3-4 small sparkles and 2 little hearts. Thick lines, ages 3-5. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: chapter 2 coloring page — friendly baby dragon
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a cute chibi baby dragon sitting and smiling. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. The dragon has a round head with big eyes, two small horns, a friendly smile with one tiny tooth, a rounded body with a lighter belly patch (separate region), four short legs, a tail ending in a heart or arrow shape, two small wings each divided into 3 feather sections, and a little puff of fire or a heart coming out of its mouth. Around it: 3-4 separate small stars. Thick lines, chibi rounded, ages 3-5 friendly. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: chapter 2 coloring page — arctic fox family
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a cute chibi arctic fox family — one big fluffy fox parent and one smaller baby fox curled beside it. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. Each fox has a pointed triangular face, two triangular ears with inner ear regions, big eyes, a tiny nose, a fluffy cheek/chest patch as a clearly separate region, four legs, and a big bushy tail with a contrasting tip region. Below them a snowy ground shape, above 4-5 separate snowflakes. Thick lines, chibi rounded, ages 3-5. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: chapter 2 coloring page — underwater coral scene
prompts.prompt: A children's coloring book page of a cheerful underwater coral reef scene. THICK BOLD SOLID BLACK outlines on PURE WHITE background, every region fully enclosed by unbroken lines. Include: 3-4 different happy smiling fish of varying shapes (round, long, with stripes), one starfish with a face, one smiling octopus with 8 clearly separate tentacles, 2-3 coral branches or sea plants with separable segments, 5-6 separate small bubbles, and a sandy seabed ground line. Thick toddler coloring book lines, chibi friendly style, ages 3-5. NO shading, NO colors, ONLY black lines on white. No text.

prompts.used_in: ending scene character
prompts.prompt: A cute chibi-style ice princess for a children's game, age appropriate for toddlers, long pale silver-blonde braid, friendly smile, big sparkling eyes, pastel icy-blue flowing dress with snowflake patterns and a short lavender cape, small silver tiara with a snowflake motif, standing pose with one hand gently raised, soft pastel color palette (icy blue, lavender, pink, white), children's picture book illustration, warm and welcoming expression, NOT Disney Elsa, completely original design, isolated on pure flat solid white (#FFFFFF) background, subject fills most of the frame with clear white margin, full body, no text, no logo

prompts.used_in: optional mascot / guide character (future scenes)
prompts.prompt: An adorable tiny snow sprite mascot for a toddler game, a small friendly snowflake-shaped character with a cute round face, big smiling eyes, tiny rosy cheeks, soft glowing pale-blue and white body with sparkle accents, chibi storybook style, isolated on pure flat solid white (#FFFFFF) background, subject fills most of the frame with clear white margin, front view, no shadow, no text, centered composition, inviting and friendly expression
